articles.description:
Starbucks' 2025-2026 winter menu has arrived, featuring two new Caramel Protein beverages and two new Dubai Chocolate drinks, among other food and drinks.

Here's what you'll find featured on the menu at Starbucks this winter:
- New Caramel Protein Matcha - A permanent menu addition featuring matcha with protein-boosted milk and classic or sugar-free caramel syrup. It's available hot or iced and contains up to 28 to 31 grams of protein per Grande.
- New Caramel Protein Latte - A permanent menu addition featuring Starbucks Espresso Roast, protein-boosted milk, and caramel syrup. It's available hot or iced and contains up to 27-29 grams of protein per Grande.
- New Iced Dubai Chocolate Matcha (available for a limited time only) - Matcha, pistachio sauce, milk, and ice, topped with chocolate …
articles.title: Starbucks 2025-2026 Winter Menu Includes New Caramel Protein, Dubai Chocolate, and More

articles.description:
Citing popular demand, Zaxbys brings back Southern Fried Shrimp and Giant Quesadillas for a limited time.

Zaxbys' Southern Fried Shrimp is available in three options:
- ZaxSeas Surf & Turf Meal - Eight Southern Fried Shrimp, Zax Sauce, three Chicken Fingerz, Texas Toast, Crinkle Fries, and a small drink.
- Southern Fried Shrimp Meal - Eight Southern Fried Shrimp, Zax Sauce, Texas Toast, Crinkle Fries, and a small drink.
- Southern Fried Shrimp Side - Eight shrimp with Zax Sauce.
Prices vary, but a location in Atlanta charges $14.99 for the Surf & Turf Meal, $11.49 for the Southern Fried Shrimp Meal, and $6.99 for eight shrimp.
There are two Giant Quesadillas to choose from:
- Chicken Bacon Ranch Quesadilla - Three hand-breaded Chicken Fingerz, Cheddar Jack cheese, hardwood-smoked bacon, and ranch dressing, folded into a warm flour tortilla. It's served with a side of ranch and a small drink.
- Chicken Fajita Quesadilla - Three hand-breaded Chicken Fingerz, Cheddar Jack cheese, grilled onions and peppers, and Southwest Ranch, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. It comes with a side of ranch and a small drink.
The same location sells both quesadillas for $11.49 each.
Photo via Zaxbys.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Southern Fried Shrimp and Giant Quesadillas Return to Zaxbys

articles.description:
Jersey Mike's introduces the new Mike's Hot Italian sub as a limited-time special.

Selling for a discounted price of $8.95 for a regular size ($16.95 for a Giant), Mike's Hot Italian features ham, salami, and pepperoni grilled and chopped with melted provolone cheese, and then topped with grilled onions, lettuce, tomato, and chopped pepper relish on your choice of bread.
It was tested in four markets late last year.
Photo via Jersey Mike's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Jersey Mike's Launches New Mike's Hot Italian Sub

articles.description:
Chick-fil-A is testing new Iced Coffee flavors and new Cream Cold Brew at participating restaurants in the cities of Anniston, Birmingham, and Tuscaloosa in Alabama.

The Iced Coffee is being tested with new Caramel and Mocha flavors in addition to the current Vanilla and Plain options.
The new Cream Cold Brew features the chain's cold-brewed coffee (same as its iced coffee) mixed with a sweet cream blend (the chain's milkshake base, according to the ingredients list) and served over ice. Like the Iced Coffee, it is available in Caramel, Mocha, Vanilla, and Plain varieties.
The coffee beverage test runs through January 31, 2026, while supplies last.
Photo via Chick-fil-A.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Chick-fil-A Tests New Cream Cold Brew

articles.description:
McDonald's updates its Extra Value Meal deals by offering the $5 Sausage McMuffin with Egg Meal and the $8 Two Snack Wrap Meal for a limited time at participating locations.

The $5 Sausage McMuffin with Egg Meal includes a Sausage McMuffin with Egg, Hash Browns, and a small coffee.
The $8 Two Snack Wrap Meal includes two Snack Wraps (two Ranch, Two Spicy, or one of each), medium fries, and a medium fountain drink.
Photo via McDonald's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: McDonald's Updates Extra Value Meal Deals

articles.description:
Crumbl bakes new Dubai Chocolate Cookies as part of this week's rotating dessert menu available from January 19 through January 24, 2026.

The Crumbl offers a rotating menu of four desserts each week, along with a permanent Classic menu. Here's what this week's limited-time options include:
- New Dubai Chocolate Cookie (pictured) - A brownie cookie layered with a crunchy kataifi and pistachio filling, finished with milk chocolate and a drizzle of pistachio cream.
- Brown Sugar Cinnamon Cookie featuring Pop-Tarts - A warm brown sugar cinnamon-stuffed cookie topped with a brown sugar cream cheese glaze and crumbled Pop-Tarts.
- Strawberry Crumb Cake Cookie - A buttery strawberry cookie with white drops, topped with a milky glaze and strawberry vanilla streusel.
- Peanut Butter & Jelly Cookie - A warm peanut butter cookie topped with swirls of peanut butter mousse and raspberry topping.
The cookie bakery chain is also offering Chocolate Chip Cookie Thins on Thursdays only.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Bakes New Dubai Chocolate Cookies and More

articles.description:
Applebee's welcomes the new O-M-Cheese Burger to kick off 2026.

Priced at a suggested $11.99, the new burger is served in a sizzling skillet with a pool of melted queso and Cheddar cheeses. The burger consists of a beef patty, American cheese, applewood-smoked bacon, and spicy honey mustard on a toasted bun. Classic fries are included on the side. The O-M-Cheese Burger is also featured as an entree option of Applebee's 2 for $25 Menu, alongside Fiesta Lime Chicken and the Oriental Chicken Salad.
In addition to the new burger, $6 Mucho Smoocho Sips are back for a limited time. The discounted Valentine's Day-themed cocktails include the Tipsy Cupid and the new Prickly Ever After Rita. They're joined by the new Prickly Melon Rush Mocktail.
The Tipsy Cupid features Smirnoff Vodka, orange liqueur, strawberry, and premium lemon sour, garnished with gummy lips.
The New Prickly Ever After Rita features Cuervo Tradicional Blanco Tequila, orange liqueur, lime, and prickly pear, garnished with gummy lips.
The Prickly Melon Rush Mocktail is a mix of Red Bull Watermelon, prickly pear, lime juice, and lemon lime soda.
Photo via Applebee's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Applebee's Serves Up New O-M-Cheese Burger

articles.description:
Jimmy John's adds the new Ham & Three Cheese Melt as a permanent menu item. The new sandwich is joined by the limited-time return of Kickin' Ranch Chips and Red Velvet Cookies. 

Also, the chain is running a limited-time promotion where you can add chips and a drink to any sandwich or wrap purchase for $1.
Jimmy John's new Ham & Three Cheese Melt is a toasted sub that features a double portion of ham served with cheddar, provolone, parmesan, and mayo on French bread.
Kickin' Ranch Chips are potato chips with a "zesty ranch flavor and bold pepper kick," while the Red Velvet Cookie is made with dark brown sugar, cocoa powder, a hint of vanilla, and sweet white chips.
Prices vary, but a regular Ham & Three Cheese Melt costs $11.69 at my local Jimmy John's here in Los Angeles. At the same location, a bag of Kickin' Ranch Chips is $3.29 and a Red Velvet Cookie costs $3.49.
Photo via Jimmy John's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: New Ham & Three Cheese Melt and More Arrive at Jimmy John's

articles.description:
Sonic starts off the new year on the value trail with the introduction of the new $6 All-American Smasher Meal for a limited time at participating locations nationwide.

The value-priced combo meal includes:


An All-American Sonic Smasher
Medium Tots or Groovy Fries.
Medium Soft Drink or Iced Tea.


The All-American Sonic Smasher is a new, limited-time variant of the Sonic Smasher, featuring two made-to-order, smashed Angus beef patties served with American cheese, shredded lettuce, tomato, crinkle-cut pickles, diced onions, ketchup, and mayo on a soft potato bun. It is also available as the All-American Triple Sonic Smasher (with three beef patties), All-American Bacon Sonic Smasher (with bacon), and the All-American Triple Bacon Sonic Smasher (with three beef patties and bacon).
Other limited-time menu items at Sonic right now include:


Cherry Flavor Bubble Slush - A cherry slush with blue raspberry flavor bubbles.
Green Apple Flavor Bubble Slush - A green apple slush with blue raspberry flavor bubbles.
Salted Caramel Toffee Croissant Bites - Flaky Croissant Bites tossed in salted caramel and toffee sugar.


Photo via Sonic.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Sonic Introduces New $6 All-American Smasher Meal

articles.description:
Taco Bell is updating its Cravings Value Menu and renaming it the new Luxe Value Menu starting January 22, 2026. Taco Bell Rewards Members get early access to the new menu now when ordering through the Taco Bell mobile app or website.

The Luxe Value Menu features 10 items priced at $3 or less, including five new dishes. The new items include:
- New Mini Taco Salad (suggested price of $2.49) - A crispy tortilla bowl filled with seasoned beef, creamy Chipotle Sauce, cheddar cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, and refried beans.
- New Beefy Potato Loaded Griller (suggested price of $2.49) - Seasoned ground beef, Creamy Chipotle Sauce, nacho cheese sauce, reduced-fat sour cream, and crispy potato bites, wrapped up in a flour tortilla and grilled.
- New Chips & Nacho Supreme Dip (suggested price of $2.49) - Layers of seasoned beef, refried beans, nacho cheese sauce, reduced-fat sour cream, pico de gallo, and a three-cheese blend, served with tortilla chips.
- New Avocado Ranch Chicken Stacker (suggested price of $2.99) - Grilled white-meat chicken, Avocado Ranch Sauce, three-cheese blend, lettuce, and tomatoes, folded in a flour tortilla and grilled.
- New, limited-time Salted Caramel Churros (suggested price of $1.99) - Three churros with a creamy filling, dusted in salted caramel sugar.
Returning on the value menu are:
- Cheesy Roll Up for a suggested price of $1.19.
- Spicy Potato Soft Taco for a suggested price of $1.29.
- Cheesy Bean and Rice Burrito for a suggested price of $1.49.
- 3 Cheese Chicken Flatbread Melt for a suggested price of $2.29.
- Cheesy Double Beef Burrito for a suggested price of $2.79.
As a promotion for the updated value menu, on January 27, 2026, at 2PM, Taco Bell will be holding a Tuesday Drop where the first 30,000 rewards members can claim a Luxe Value Menu item for $1.
Photo via Taco Bell.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Taco Bell Reveals New Luxe Value Menu

articles.description:
Krispy Kreme introduces its new Winter Seasonal Collection of four donuts for the 2025-2026 winter.

The winter lineup includes:

articles.description:
KFC's Spicy Zinger Sandwich features a new Extra Crispy Spicy Zinger marinated chicken breast filet served with shredded Romaine lettuce and the Colonel's Mayo on a toasted brioche bun. It's a test item here in California.

I bought one for $6.49.
I think my local KFC was still working out the kinks on making this (or they just didn't have lettuce on hand), as mine came with pickles instead of lettuce. I didn't mind it as lettuce on a hot chicken sandwich tends to wilt quickly, while pickles add a nice crunch and acidity.
In terms of texture, the new chicken filet felt the same as KFC's regular Extra Crispy chicken breast filet. Mine felt like it had been sitting in the warmer for a while, but it was thick, relatively tender, and moist inside and flaky and crispy outside.



Flavor-wise, there was a light seasoned flavor and a respectable amount of medium heat. It was spicy enough to get my nose running, but not so much that I went reaching for milk. It's probably as spicy as you're going to get at a major fast-food chain that isn't dishing Buffalo wings.
The bun was a little stale. It was still moist inside, but the crust was somewhat hardened and dry.
Overall, KFC's Spicy Zinger Sandwich was pretty good and even better if you can get a fresh one. I enjoyed the heat, and I prefer a spicy chicken filet over a spicy sauce.
Note - Sorry, there's no cross-section shot for this review. I cut the sandwich and set up the shot, but then had a brain fart and didn't take a picture.
Nutritional Info - KFC Spicy Zinger Sandwich
Calories - 480
Fat - 23g (Saturated Fat - 3g)
Sodium - 1360mg
Carbs - 37g (Sugar - 5g)
Protein - 33g
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Review: KFC - Spicy Zinger Sandwich

Burger King has used the "steakhouse" moniker for quite a few burgers in the past. Some examples include the Steakhouse Whopper, the Steakhouse King, and the BK Stuffed Steakhouse Burger.
The new, limited-time Cinnamon Apple Pie is a deep-fried turnover-style pie with a crispy crust and warm, cinnamon apple filling. It costs $1.99 near me. The chain previously offered the Dutch Apple Pie, which was sold by the slice and discontinued in 2020.
The Ultimate Steakhouse Whopper follows last year's BBQ Brisket Whopper and Crispy Onion Whopper in the "Whopper by You" series. Burger King plans to release additional guest-inspired Whopper burgers later this year.
Photo via Burger King.
